query:
SELECT id, customerName, status, orderCount, allocatedCount, skippedCount, createdAt,
       pullList IS NOT NULL AS has_pull_list,
       JSON_LENGTH(pullList) AS pull_list_entries
FROM allocation_runs
WHERE customerName LIKE '%Amercare%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
